channel.title: Speech-Synthesis on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Speech-Synthesis on Arrans github.io

item.title: coqui-ai/TTS
item.description: 🐸💬 - a deep learning toolkit for Text-to-Speech, battle-tested in research and production

item.title: rhasspy/piper
item.description: A fast, local neural text to speech system

item.title: azkadev/whisper
item.description: Whisper Dart is a cross platform library for dart and flutter that allows converting audio to text / speech to text / inference from Open AI models
